query: How do I connect Claude Code to my running n8n so it can create workflows on it?
expected_behavior: Gives the `claude mcp add n8n-mcp ... -- npx n8n-mcp` command
Sets N8N_API_URL + N8N_API_KEY to unlock the n8n_* management tools
Explains key comes from Settings -> n8n API
Notes the nodeType two-prefix gotcha (nodes-base.X for tools vs n8n-nodes-base.X in workflow JSON)
